requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Appliances (SANS / IEC CISPR 14 series; ICASA for radio modules)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用电器（SANS / IEC CISPR 14系列；含无线模块的ICASA）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用電器（SANS / IEC CISPR 14系列；含無線模組的ICASA）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in South Africa are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on the SANS adoptions of the IEC CISPR 14 series — SANS 214-1 / CISPR 14-1 for emission and SANS 214-2 / CISPR 14-2 for immunity of household appliances, electric tools, and similar apparatus. EMC requirements support the broader safety and product-quality regime overseen by the NRCS and SABS. Where a refrigerator incorporates a radio-frequency module (for example a Wi-Fi or Bluetooth smart-fridge function), separate type approval and a label from ICASA (Independent Communications Authority of South Africa) under the Electronic Communications Act are required before the radio-enabled product may be supplied. Testing should be performed by an accredited laboratory and emission/immunity test reports retained for NRCS and ICASA review.
summary.zh: 在南非销售的家用电冰箱须符合以SANS采纳IEC CISPR 14系列为基础的电磁兼容要求——家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的发射采用SANS 214-1 / CISPR 14-1，抗扰度采用SANS 214-2 / CISPR 14-2。电磁兼容要求支撑NRCS和SABS监管的更广泛安全与产品质量制度。若电冰箱内含射频模块（例如Wi-Fi或蓝牙智能冰箱功能），则在供应该具无线功能产品前，须依据《电子通信法》取得ICASA（南非独立通信管理局）的单独型号核准及标识。检测应由经认可的实验室进行，发射/抗扰度检测报告须留存以供NRCS和ICASA查阅。
summary.zht: 在南非銷售的家用電冰箱須符合以SANS採納IEC CISPR 14系列為基礎的電磁相容要求——家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的發射採用SANS 214-1 / CISPR 14-1，抗擾度採用SANS 214-2 / CISPR 14-2。電磁相容要求支撐NRCS和SABS監管的更廣泛安全與產品質量制度。若電冰箱內含射頻模組（例如Wi-Fi或藍牙智能冰箱功能），則在供應該具無線功能產品前，須依據《電子通信法》取得ICASA（南非獨立通信管理局）的單獨型號核准及標識。檢測應由經認可的實驗室進行，發射/抗擾度檢測報告須留存以供NRCS和ICASA查閱。

standards_or_laws: SANS 214-1 / CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
SANS 214-2 / CISPR 14-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 2: Immunity
Electronic Communications Act 36 of 2005 — ICASA type approval for radio-frequency modules (smart-fridge Wi-Fi/Bluetooth)

summary.en: In China, EMC for household refrigerators is covered by GB 4343.1 (emission) and GB 4343.2 (immunity, equivalent to the CISPR 14 series) and is part of the mandatory CCC certification scheme for household electrical appliances enforced by SAMR/CNCA. Refrigerators on the CCC catalogue must hold a valid CCC certificate, which includes EMC test data. Radio modules are separately handled under SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval. Because both China (GB 4343) and South Africa (SANS 214) adopt the CISPR 14 base standard, the technical limits are closely aligned, but Chinese CCC and SRRC certificates are not recognised in South Africa and the South African regime relies on the NRCS LOA and, for radio, ICASA approval.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱的电磁兼容由GB 4343.1（发射）和GB 4343.2（抗扰度，等同CISPR 14系列）涵盖，并属于由SAMR/CNCA执行的家用电器强制CCC认证范畴。列入CCC目录的电冰箱须持有有效CCC证书，其中包含电磁兼容检测数据。无线模块另由SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准处理。由于中国（GB 4343）和南非（SANS 214）均采纳CISPR 14基础标准，技术限值高度一致，但中国CCC和SRRC证书在南非不被承认，南非制度依赖NRCS许可函，无线部分则依赖ICASA核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱的電磁相容由GB 4343.1（發射）和GB 4343.2（抗擾度，等同CISPR 14系列）涵蓋，並屬於由SAMR/CNCA執行的家用電器強制CCC認證範疇。列入CCC目錄的電冰箱須持有有效CCC證書，其中包含電磁相容檢測數據。無線模組另由SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准處理。由於中國（GB 4343）和南非（SANS 214）均採納CISPR 14基礎標準，技術限值高度一致，但中國CCC和SRRC證書在南非不被承認，南非制度依賴NRCS許可函，無線部分則依賴ICASA核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (CISPR 14-1 aligned; part of CCC)
GB 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (CISPR 14-2 aligned; part of CCC)
SRRC type approval — radio-frequency module certification for smart-fridge wireless functions

gap.en: Although the underlying CISPR 14 emission and immunity limits are technically aligned between China's GB 4343 and South Africa's SANS 214, Chinese CCC EMC test data and certificates are not accepted as proof of conformity in South Africa. EMC evidence must be presented as part of the NRCS Letter of Authority dossier for the refrigerator, ideally from an accredited (SANAS or ILAC-MRA) laboratory. Separately, any radio-enabled smart-fridge module that holds only a Chinese SRRC approval must obtain ICASA type approval and bear the ICASA label before supply — SRRC is not recognised. Exporters should confirm whether their existing CISPR 14 reports can be leveraged or whether re-testing/re-reporting under SANS/ICASA scope is required.
gap.zh: 尽管中国GB 4343与南非SANS 214在CISPR 14发射和抗扰度限值上技术一致，但中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据和证书在南非不被接受为合格证明。电磁兼容证据须作为电冰箱NRCS许可函档案的一部分提交，最好出自经认可（SANAS或ILAC-MRA）的实验室。此外，仅持有中国SRRC核准的具无线功能智能冰箱模块，在供应前须取得ICASA型号核准并加贴ICASA标识——SRRC不被承认。出口商应确认现有CISPR 14报告能否被采用，或是否须按SANS/ICASA范围重新检测/重新出具报告。
gap.zht: 儘管中國GB 4343與南非SANS 214在CISPR 14發射和抗擾度限值上技術一致，但中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據和證書在南非不被接受為合格證明。電磁相容證據須作為電冰箱NRCS許可函檔案的一部分提交，最好出自經認可（SANAS或ILAC-MRA）的實驗室。此外，僅持有中國SRRC核准的具無線功能智能冰箱模組，在供應前須取得ICASA型號核准並加貼ICASA標識——SRRC不被承認。出口商應確認現有CISPR 14報告能否被採用，或是否須按SANS/ICASA範圍重新檢測/重新出具報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — EMC conformity to the SANS 214 / CISPR 14 series forms part of the NRCS Letter of Authority evidence for household appliances; ICASA type approval is separately mandatory for any radio-frequency module before supply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 EMC compliance is part of CCC certification for household refrigerators; SRRC type approval mandatory for radio modules

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC limits are technically harmonised through CISPR 14, but Chinese CCC EMC certificates are not recognised in South Africa. EMC test evidence must be supplied within the NRCS LOA dossier, preferably from a SANAS/ILAC-MRA accredited lab, and any wireless smart-fridge function needs separate ICASA type approval before supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电磁兼容限值通过CISPR 14实现技术协调，但中国CCC电磁兼容证书在南非不被承认。电磁兼容检测证据须在NRCS许可函档案内提交，最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA认可实验室，任何无线智能冰箱功能在供应前须另行取得ICASA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電磁相容限值通過CISPR 14實現技術協調，但中國CCC電磁相容證書在南非不被承認。電磁相容檢測證據須在NRCS許可函檔案內提交，最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA認可實驗室，任何無線智能冰箱功能在供應前須另行取得ICASA型號核准。
